title: alangium kurzii
intro: Alangium kurzii, also known as the Thai allspice tree, is a species of plant in the family Cornaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, with its bark, leaves, and roots being used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Alangium kurzii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of infections and reduce inflammation. Alangium kurzii is often prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and can also be made into a paste or powder for topical application or oral consumption.
